task_completion.description: Open and read the architecture specifications on the desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document, text file, or image viewer open on the desktop displaying the detailed architecture specifications for the hazelcast workload.
Rancher UI Service creation or details screen showing a Service named 'hazelcast-discovery' in the 'data-grid' namespace with the Cluster IP explicitly set to 'None' or marked as Headless.
Rancher UI Workloads list for the 'data-grid' namespace showing the original 'hazelcast-mock' Deployment being deleted, or a confirmation prompt for its deletion.

task_completion.description: Create a new StatefulSet named 'hazelcast-mock' with 3 replicas
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI Workloads screen showing the creation or active status of a StatefulSet named 'hazelcast-mock' in the 'data-grid' namespace, with the replica count set to 3.

task_completion.description: Link the StatefulSet to the 'hazelcast-discovery' headless service
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI StatefulSet configuration or details page for 'hazelcast-mock' showing the 'Service Name' or 'Headless Service' field explicitly set to 'hazelcast-discovery'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web interface to perform the migration
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser is open to https://localhost showing the Rancher UI, rather than a terminal window running kubectl commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually created and modified resources in the cluster
integrity.visual_evidence: Rancher UI shows actual resource lists, creation forms, or success notifications, not just text typed into a notepad or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent created a StatefulSet, not just another Deployment
integrity.visual_evidence: The workload type for the new 'hazelcast-mock' is clearly labeled as 'StatefulSet' in the Rancher UI, rather than 'Deployment' or 'DaemonSet'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace is 'data-grid'. Target workload is 'hazelcast-mock'. The pass threshold for the task is 75 points. The task requires replacing the existing Deployment with a StatefulSet and linking it to a headless service.
